title: Trace
description: A complete record of a single LLM application execution in Opik, capturing the full lifecycle from input to output including spans, feedback scores, and usage metrics.

project_name.description: Name of the project this trace belongs to. If null, the default project is used.

project_id.description: UUID of the project this trace belongs to.

input.description: The input passed to the LLM application for this trace.

output.description: The output produced by the LLM application for this trace.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the trace.

error_info.description: Error information if the trace encountered a failure.

usage.description: Token usage statistics for the trace (e.g., prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the trace record was created.

last_updated_at.description: Timestamp when the trace record was last updated.

created_by.description: Username or identifier of the user who created the trace.

last_updated_by.description: Username or identifier of the user who last updated the trace.

feedback_scores.description: Evaluation scores attached directly to this trace.

span_feedback_scores.description: Aggregated feedback scores averaged across all spans in this trace.

comments.description: User comments attached to this trace.

total_estimated_cost.description: Estimated total cost of LLM API calls made during this trace.

duration.description: Duration of the trace in milliseconds.

FeedbackScore.description: A scored evaluation result attached to a Trace or Span.

Comment.description: A user comment on a Trace or Span.
